title: centranthus nevadensis subsp. maroccanus
intro: Centranthus nevadensis subsp. maroccanus, also known as Maroccan Valerian or Red Valerian, is a flowering plant species in the family Valerianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its sedative, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Centranthus nevadensis subsp. maroccanus include relieving anxiety and insomnia, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
